text: In the end, we are our choices. Build yourself a great story.
source: Princeton Baccalaureate Address - 'We Are What We Choose'
speech: We Are What We Choose (Princeton Baccalaureate)
context: The central thesis contrasting gifts (cleverness) with choices (kindness).

text: Cleverness is a gift, kindness is a choice.
source: Princeton Baccalaureate Address - 'We Are What We Choose'
speech: We Are What We Choose (Princeton Baccalaureate)
context: The key distinction that defines character more than talent.

text: Gifts are easy — they're given after all. Choices can be hard.
source: Princeton Baccalaureate Address - 'We Are What We Choose'
speech: We Are What We Choose (Princeton Baccalaureate)
context: Emphasizing that character is forged in difficult decisions.

text: You can seduce yourself with your gifts if you're not careful, and if you do, it'll probably be to the detriment of your choices.
source: Princeton Baccalaureate Address - 'We Are What We Choose'
speech: We Are What We Choose (Princeton Baccalaureate)
context: Warning against relying on natural talent instead of deliberate choices.

text: What we choose to do with our gifts will define us.
source: Princeton Baccalaureate Address - 'We Are What We Choose'
speech: We Are What We Choose (Princeton Baccalaureate)
context: Urging graduates to use advantages deliberately in service of a meaningful life.

text: Be stubborn on vision but flexible on details.
context: Core Amazon principle for long-term thinking while adapting tactics.

text: What's dangerous is not to evolve.
context: Warning against complacency in business and personal growth.

text: The Regret Minimization Framework: When you have a tough decision to make, project yourself forward to age 80 and ask, 'Which choice will I regret more?'
context: Insightful tool for making bold life and business choices.

source: Princeton Baccalaureate Address - 'We Are What We Choose'
speech: We Are What We Choose (Princeton Baccalaureate)
context: The title and central theme: character is defined by cumulative choices.

text: Day 1 is about being customer-obsessed, about long-term thinking, and about high-velocity decision making.
context: Insight into maintaining startup agility at scale.
